_comment: OurLibrary Google Drive Configuration - REAL PRODUCTION SETTINGS

_setup_instructions.step1: Database 'OurLibrary.db' is already uploaded to Google Drive folder
_setup_instructions.step2: File should be publicly accessible with 'Anyone with the link can view'
_setup_instructions.step4: Find 'OurLibrary.db' file and copy its file ID from the URL
_setup_instructions.step5: Replace 'database_file_id' above with the real file ID
_setup_instructions.step6: The setup will automatically download the database for users
_setup_instructions.note: File ID is the long string in the Google Drive URL after /file/d/
